action_selector.name: loso_annotation_prototype_plus_knowledge_library_barfit
action_selector.nonrepeatable_mix_rule: For barfit, mix actions planned for 3 or more bars are used at most once per song; short mix actions and ietora/activation-style triggers may repeat.
action_selector.leakage_note: The held-out song's recommended_actions are not used for action selection.

action_selection.note: Held-out song annotation actions are not used for selection.
